description: Machine-readable runtime artifact bundle for GAQP-compliant implementations. This is the current working draft. Checksum and release date will be set at version freeze.

files.description: Seven admission tests with pass conditions
Canonical 29-field claim record schema with field groups, types, and nullability rules
Forbidden labels, remap table, developer rules
Complete domain subtag taxonomy for all 30 sectors — ~3,126 subtags total. Used in domain_tags_pipe field. Statutory layer: updated as industries evolve without requiring a version bump.

Controlled vocabulary for the tags_pipe field. Four closed prefixes: func (business function), risk (risk category), topic (subject topic), geo (geography). Extensible values via IQS suggestion process.
.intel sidecar file format specification: naming convention, 14-section structure, validation rules, and example skeleton.

notes.domain_modules: 31 sectors with domain subtags in domain_modules.json (GEN General/Cross-Sector carries no subtags by design). v0.2 adds Military (MIL) — 247 subtags across 15 dimensions, including the unique GAQP Intelligence Functions dimension. Subtag taxonomy is statutory — additions do not require a version bump.
notes.schema_freeze: Canonical 29-field schema established. Constitutional layer is stable. Checksum and release_date will be set at v1.0 freeze.
